aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Breeze Heating Air & Electrical due to strong local SEO signals, but conversational content and authority positioning need improvement to secure top recommendations.
quick_wins: Add FAQ schema markup to capture more conversational queries.
Optimize existing content for long-tail, conversational keywords relevant to HVAC and electrical services.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is not actively managed.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any new citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema for conversational queries.
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC and electrical maintenance tasks.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content limits AI model citations for long-tail queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to specific HVAC troubleshooting and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema and expanding content to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC and electrical experts through detailed guides, certifications, and media mentions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Current content lacks FAQ schema and conversational depth, making it less likely to be cited by AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Enhance schema markup, create conversational content, and establish authority signals to boost AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expected 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; act now to secure your position.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for Breeze Heating Air & Electrical
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's discuss how to optimize your content and schema to capture more AI-driven leads.
